description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:${GO_VERSION} Docker image (GO_VERSION set to '1.8') and defines two stages: test and build. Include a global before_script that runs: cd ~, mkdir -p ${GOPATH}/src/gitlab.com/apetitbois/, ln -s ${CI_PROJECT_DIR} ${GOPATH}/src/gitlab.com/apetitbois/${PACKAGE_NAME}, and cd ${GOPATH}/src/gitlab.com/apetitbois/${PACKAGE_NAME}. In the test stage add a test job that runs the command go test -v $(go list ./... | grep -v /vendor/) -cover. In the build stage add a build job that exports HASH=`git rev-parse --short HEAD`, runs go get github.com/mitchellh/gox, then runs gox -ldflags "-X main.version=${RELEASE_VERSION}-${HASH}" -osarch "darwin/amd64 linux/amd64 windows/amd64" -output "{{.OS}}/{{.Arch}}/${PACKAGE_NAME}" -parallel 3, and publishes all files as untracked artifacts. Define variables GO_VERSION, PACKAGE_NAME (packt-sync), and RELEASE_VERSION (1.0.1).
